login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your campus.
login.subdomainHint: Your school subdomain — find it in your welcome email or ask your admin.
login.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

panel.title: Your school,
panel.subtitle: Sign in to find your classes, your students, and your up-to-date data.
panel.testimonialQuote: « We stopped using spreadsheets after the first month. The whole team got on board right away. »

story.bodyText: Too many Cameroonian school directors spend their evenings buried in paper registers, manual grade sheets, and handwritten receipts. Akademee was built to change that.
story.benefit1Desc: Grades and GCE sequences calculated automatically.
story.benefit2Desc: Admins, teachers, students and parents — each with their own portal.
story.benefit3Desc: Know who has paid and send reminders from your dashboard.
story.testimonialQuote: Before Akademee, I spent every Sunday preparing attendance sheets and grade reports by hand. Now it takes me 10 minutes.

school.title: Your school
school.subtitle: Tell us about your institution — this creates your unique campus on Akademee.
school.name: School name

admin.title: Admin account
admin.subtitle: This will be the primary administrator account for your campus.

plan.title: Choose your plan
plan.subtitle: Start free and upgrade whenever your school is ready. No credit card required.

free.name: Free
free.desc: Basic features for small schools getting started.

premium.name: Premium
premium.desc: Everything you need for full campus management.

panel.title: Run your school
panel.subtitle: Students, grades, attendance and parent communication, all in one dashboard.
panel.slideDashboardDesc: Track your institution's performance in real-time with clear, relevant indicators.
panel.slideGradesDesc: Enter grades, generate report cards, and share them with parents in one click.
panel.slideAttendanceDesc: Record attendance and receive automatic alerts for unexcused absences.
panel.slideFinanceDesc: Track payments, manage deadlines, and generate receipts automatically.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your school subdomain and email address and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentMessage: If an account exists with that email, we've sent a password reset link. It expires in 1 hour.
forgotPassword.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.pwdTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. Redirecting you to sign in...
resetPassword.invalidMessage: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

verifyEmail.verifyingDesc: Please wait while we confirm your email address.
verifyEmail.successMessage: {{schoolName}} has been verified. You can now complete your campus setup.
verifyEmail.successMessageSimple: Your email has been verified successfully.
verifyEmail.alreadyVerifiedMessageSimple: This email has already been verified.
verifyEmail.error: Verification failed. The link may be invalid or expired.
